meaning: n.胆汁,恶毒,怨恨,五倍子,苦味,磨伤(尤指马的),肿痛,恼怒vt.磨伤,烦恼,屈辱vi.被磨伤
examples: Then they had the gall to complain!
He has the gall to accuse reporters of exploiting a tragedy for their own ends.
"Brimstone and gall," thundered Hook, "what cozening is going on here!"
The Whaddon Road manager told BBC Radio Gloucestershire that 26-year-old Gall would be a good signing.
"This is not like doing a gall bladder or appendix operation, " says Dr. Harvey J.
